description: Create a Data Quality (DQ) system in OpenLCA and apply it to a 'Coal fired power plant' electricity generation process from the USLCI database (import from ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip). The DQ system must include five indicators scored 1-5: Reliability, Completeness, Temporal correlation, Geographical correlation, and Technological correlation. Assign this DQ system to the process, providing a data quality score for the process itself and for at least five of its exchanges. Export a summary report containing the process name and the modified exchange scores to ~/LCA_Results/data_quality_report.csv.
